description: A designed Department of Labor card in portrait/social format that combines a hero photo, a slogan, and an embedded news excerpt. The top half is a photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark suit and red tie speaking into a microphone at a podium, set against a large rippling American flag (red-and-white stripes); the photo fades into a dark navy background. Overlaid in large serif type is the slogan 'America FIRST!' (the word 'FIRST!' in heavy bold caps). The bottom half is a white rounded text panel headed with the masthead 'THE NATIONAL LAW REVIEW,' containing two paragraphs of serif body text stating that the DOL announced a formal partnership with the EEOC under 'Project Firewall' to intensify enforcement against employers engaging in unlawful national-origin discrimination/hiring practices that disadvantage American workers, and noting enhanced data sharing and coordinated guidance to deter hiring that may prefer nonimmigrant visa holders (such as H-1B) over qualified U.S. workers. The design technique is patriotic branding (flag + 'America First' + Trump as figurehead) wrapped around a quoted third-party article to lend authority to an anti-foreign-labor enforcement message. Target audience: American workers and the political base, signaling protection of native-born jobs.
notable_text: America FIRST! | THE NATIONAL LAW REVIEW | DOL ... partnership with the EEOC under Project Firewall to intensify enforcement against ... hiring practices that disadvantage American workers
